summary: Implemented US-026 Shadow Profile module: created shadow-profile-card.ts UI component (createShadowProfileCard + createShadowProfileCardList) with [Inference] marker badge, statement heading, evidence list, and confidence badge; created shadow-profile.css with design tokens, responsive grid, confidence modifiers, and reduced-motion support; created shadow-profile-module.ts renderer that collects signals, applies inference rules, and renders cards with empty-state handling; updated barrel export, global.css import, and main.ts mounting. All 723 tests pass.
